feed.title: Alec Petersen
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Alec Petersen, a postdoctoral researcher at University of California Irvine. I work with Tirtha Banerjee, in the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering on the fluid dynamics of wildfires, ember transport and turbulence in atmospheric flows.

entry.title: Beginnings
entry.content: I wonder how this venture into website building will turn out. A fun and useful side project? A waste of time?
entry.summary: I wonder how this venture into website building will turn out. A fun and useful side project? A waste of time?

entry.title: What Else
entry.content: Can we also get latex math equations to work here? $u = \frac{dx}{dt}$
entry.summary: Can we also get latex math equations to work here? $u = \frac{dx}{dt}$
